LanguageData.VQED_DeathPit.label: death pit
LanguageData.VQED_DeathPit.description: A sealed containment pit lined with ancient restraints. Faint trails of deadlife dust seep from the cracks, and something inside constantly shifts, pushing, scraping, trying to crawl free.
LanguageData.VQED_DeathHole.label: death hole
LanguageData.VQED_DeathHole.description: A small containment hole where failed experiments were thrown, with the intention to later on be buried in concrete. Faint trails of deadlife dust seep out, and something inside constantly shifts, pushing, scraping, trying to crawl free.
LanguageData.VQED_DeadlifeNode.label: deadlife node
LanguageData.VQED_DeadlifeNode.description: A volatile node buried in the facility. Proximity or movement causes instability and discharge of deadlife particles.
LanguageData.VQED_OpenChute.label: chute
LanguageData.VQED_OpenChute.description: An open chute with an unknown purpose. Some eerie sounds can be heard down below, but nobody knows how deep it goes.
LanguageData.VQED_ActiveDeadlifeVent.label: deadlife vent
LanguageData.VQED_ActiveDeadlifeVent.description: A free standing vent connected to an underground deadlife particle distribution system. An endless supply of deadlife dust pours from the outflow.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryTurret.label: ancient military turret
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryTurret.description: An automatic turret. Belt-fed ammunition ensures it can fire continuously for long periods of time, but its dumb AI brain can't be directly controlled, which makes friendly fire likely.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryTurret_Bullet.label: mini-turret bullet
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryTurret_Gun.label: ancient military turret
LanguageData.VQED_AncientMilitaryTurret_Gun.descripti: A simple automatic gun made to be mounted on a turret.
LanguageData.VQED_OpenRotstinkVent.label: rotstink vent
LanguageData.VQED_OpenRotstinkVent.description: A large vent connected to some revolting storage of biomass. Ejects huge amounts of rotstink gas.
